title: Eva Action Figures 2
wikitext:
[]: Eva Action Figures [2] Post by soundwaveCA » Sat Jan 08, 2011 12:43 pm Anybody have any impute on Medicoms RAH (Real Action Hero) line? Thinking of picking up the plugsuite Asuka figure, and the pictures of these look pretty good but I've heard mixed things about these especially considering the price.

[]: Side effects may include drowsiness and sexual arousal. Post by Killer Bee » Sat Jan 08, 2011 8:27 pm What are your issues with the price? They're expensive (which is why I still don't have one) but as long as you know that you're going to be getting a 12" doll and not something larger than that, then there shouldn't be a problem. I've only ever heard good things about them, EXCEPT for the plugsuits. I've heard that the plugsuits can tear very easily if you're not careful with them, particularly around the elbow and knee joints. Personally, I would buy the school uniform versions if you have your eyes set on Rei or Asuka. Sadly, Shinji, Kaworu, and Mari only come in plugsuits. Disclaimer  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by RMZX » Sat Jan 08, 2011 9:45 pm I could've sworn I had seen a listing for Mari in her school uniform on AmiAmi. Here it is: http://www.amiami.jp/shop/?set=english&vgForm=ProductInfo&sku=FIG-MOE-1803&template=default/product/e_display.html

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 12, 2011 9:07 pm Personally i'm going to get a plugsuit Shinji and a plugsuit Asuka to sate my sick fantasies. I just need to wait for my refund check which is about 2 months late.

[]: Post by Legendary » Wed Jan 12, 2011 10:49 pm If they're in plugsuits, or really clothing of any kind, I don't think they'll sate your fantasies at all.

[]: Post by Eric Blair » Wed Jan 12, 2011 10:51 pm I have all three Asuka Soryu Versions; the yellow dress, the plugsuit and the school uniform; the plugsuit one is awesome, the material is very good, it's good as a posing action figures, but honestly, I just bought it along with the shitload of figurines back then because I could. If I ever make an Eva writing contest, they would probably be part of the first prize winning pick.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 12, 2011 10:52 pm Legendary wrote: If they're in plugsuits, or really clothing of any kind, I don't think they'll sate your fantasies at all.

[]: Post by Legendary » Wed Jan 12, 2011 10:54 pm I somehow doubt the dolls have... attributes, so to speak. Certainly not functioning. So, again, no sating you.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 12, 2011 10:59 pm Legendary wrote: I somehow doubt the dolls have... attributes, so to speak. Certainly not functioning. So, again, no sating you.

[]: Post by GVman » Thu Jan 13, 2011 2:37 am RAH is top of the line. They're like the Soul of Chogokin of things non-mecha. If you can afford it, go for it.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 13, 2011 9:27 pm I wish I could, but at this point I can't afford a bagel much less the goodness of a couple of RAH figures.

[]: Post by soundwaveCA » Mon Jan 17, 2011 6:39 pm Thanks for the input (not so much the lack thereof :p). Ordered plugsuite Asuka along with the school uniform Asuka and Rei. Coincidentally any owners of these have pics of their figures?

[]: Post by Eric Blair » Mon Jan 17, 2011 6:47 pm I have the plugsuit and school uniform Asuka Soryu versions; the face of the school uniform one is not really my favorite thing.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:55 pm Hey Killer Bee, do you still have those links to the RAH auctions on that website? Post them here.

[]: Post by bogusman » Wed Jan 19, 2011 7:56 am here's some pics of my RAH eva girls, these are the old version SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by soundwaveCA » Wed Jan 19, 2011 12:29 pm Awesome thanks for sharing, cant wait until mine come now

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 19, 2011 5:56 pm And I jizzed in my pants. Anyhow, I Think they should do school uniform Shinji too if the plugsuit versions have so much trouble. Not to mention school uniform Shinji and school uniform Asuka can partake in extracurricular activities together.

[]: Post by bogusman » Wed Jan 19, 2011 10:43 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: I Think they should do school uniform Shinji too if the plugsuit versions have so much trouble.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 20, 2011 1:04 pm ^Finally, another me! Where have you been brother!? On topic, how do you think we would contact the company to give them this suggestion?

[]: Post by bogusman » Fri Jan 21, 2011 2:46 am i forgot my password & username, so for about a year just watching this forum i have no idea how to contact them though, but if i could do that i'd like to suggest them to made uniform ver of Shinji & Asuka in her new test plugsuit or maybe they'll wait until that 3.0 & 4 movie released anyway, alittle romance.. SPOILER: Show
